title: Rattan Serving Tray 34cm / 13.8" • Woven Serving Trays with Handles for Home by JUNGLE CULTURE® • Round Coffee Table Tray • Wicker Serving Basket for Bread, Fruit, Candles • Natural Honey
features: CRAFTED WITH CARE: Jungle Culture, founded by British friends Jamie and Chris, partners with independent artisans to create products that celebrate the beauty and purpose of nature. This large wicker tray, made from 100% natural rattan, combines eco-friendliness with exceptional durability, making it a beautiful addition to any home.

PREMIUM MATERIAL & DURABILITY: Handcrafted with sturdy braided fibers, this Jungle Culture serving tray offers a charming rustic touch and a strong base, ensuring long-lasting strength and versatility for everyday use, whether serving guests or organizing your space.

THOUGHTFUL DETAILS: The convenient cut-out handles make it easy to transport the artisanal tray from the kitchen to the living room, bedroom, or even bathroom, blending functionality with style. It is perfect for organizing and displaying your home decor items on countertops, tabletops, or coffee tables.

VERSATILE & STYLISH: Measuring around 14 inches by 2.6 inches (34 cm x 6.5 cm), this elegant basket tray is perfect for serving food, coffee, desserts, or as a centerpiece to display decor. Its timeless design, available in chestnut brown, whitewash or natural honey, adds a touch of natural elegance to any home, making it a thoughtful gift for any occasion.

EASY MAINTENANCE & CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: Jungle Culture offers products that are both beautiful and practical. To keep your tray in excellent condition, simply wipe it with a damp cloth and dry thoroughly—effortless care with no hassle. We are dedicated to providing high-quality rattan tableware. If you are not completely satisfied with your tray, our 60-day return policy allows for returns or replacement of damaged items.

🇬🇧 SUSTAINABLY SOURCED, ETHICALLY MADE: Jungle Culture is a UK based ethical brand focused on planet-friendly design. We work directly with artisans, use plastic-free packaging, and believe in supporting local economies. We have a long standing tradition of which we are proud of. Buying from us means backing small business with big values.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Introducing the Jungle Culture Rattan Tray – a perfect blend of functionality and rustic charm, designed to elevate your home decor and serve your needs with style. Crafted from 100% natural rattan, this versatile tray brings a touch of nature into your home while offering exceptional durability for everyday use. Available in two stunning finishes, whitewash and natural honey, and two convenient sizes: 11.8 inches by 2.4 inches (30 cm x 5 cm) and 14 inches by 2.6 inches (35 cm x 6.5 cm). Whether you're serving food, fruit, coffee, tea, desserts, bread, or cake, this tray is both practical and stylish. Its sturdy construction, with intricately braided fibers and a solid base, ensures it can handle daily use while enhancing the aesthetic of any space. The thoughtful design includes cut-out handles for easy transport, making the tray perfect for serving guests or organizing and displaying items on countertops, tabletops, or coffee tables. Its timeless design complements various interior styles, from modern to rustic. Keeping your Jungle Culture tray pristine is a breeze. Simply wipe it with a damp cloth and dry it thoroughly after cleaning. With its low-maintenance care and beautiful, natural look, this rattan tray is an essential addition to any home and makes a thoughtful gift for any occasion.
